About Mukil Exporters

Rooted in Tamil Nadu,
Trading Globally

Mukil Exporters is a trusted importer and exporter based in Marakkanam, Tamil Nadu. We specialise in sourcing and exporting premium-quality agricultural products, spices, coconut products, and artisan goods to global markets.

With our IEC code (CQMPT2214D) and a deep commitment to quality and compliance, we bridge Indian producers with international buyers — ensuring reliable, transparent, and efficient trade every step of the way.

🎯 Our Mission

To deliver the finest Indian products to global markets with integrity, quality, and on-time reliability.

🔭 Our Vision

To be the most trusted export partner from Tamil Nadu, known for premium products and exceptional service.

🤝Trust
⭐Quality
🌐Global Network
⚡Fast Logistics

What We Offer

Our Services

End-to-end trade solutions tailored for importers, exporters, and distributors worldwide.

📦

Export Services

International product shipping managed end-to-end — documentation, customs clearance, and carrier selection by our expert team.

🛬

Import Services

Global sourcing and importing with seamless customs clearance, duty optimisation, and local delivery across India.

🚢

Freight Forwarding

Sea and air cargo logistics — reliable, cost-effective door-to-door freight solutions across major international trade lanes.

📋

Compliance & Documentation

Export-import legal documents, FSSAI, phytosanitary certificates, and full regulatory compliance for hassle-free global trade.

🔍

Product Sourcing

Finding quality suppliers from Tamil Nadu and across India — we vet, negotiate, and connect you with trusted producers.

🏭

Warehousing

Safe storage and inventory management near Marakkanam with temperature-controlled options for perishable goods.

Commodities We Trade

Our Product Categories

Premium quality goods sourced directly from trusted Tamil Nadu producers and farmers.

🌾01

Agricultural Products

Farm-fresh produce, grains and pulses from verified Tamil Nadu farms.

🌶️02

Spices

Premium turmeric, pepper, cardamom, cumin and more from origin farms.

🥥03

Coconut Products

Coconut oil, desiccated coconut, coir and coconut shell products.

🍚04

Rice

Basmati, non-basmati and parboiled rice in bulk and packaged quantities.

🔥05

Charcoal

High-grade coconut shell charcoal and hardwood charcoal for BBQ and industrial use.

🍍06

Fresh Fruits

Tropical mangoes, bananas, jackfruit and seasonal produce packed for export.

👕07

Textiles

Cotton fabrics, handloom textiles and garments from Tamil Nadu weavers.

🧺08

Handicrafts

Artisan-made cane, bamboo and handwoven products for global home décor markets.
